questions.explanation:
(a) The common interior area is \(\frac12[\int_0^{\pi/6}(4-2\sin\theta)^2d\theta+\int_{\pi/6}^{5\pi/6}9d\theta+\int_{5\pi/6}^{\pi}(4-2\sin\theta)^2d\theta]=12\pi-\frac{15\sqrt3}{2}\approx24.709\).
(b) Solve \((4-2\sin(t^2))\cos(t^2)=-1\) on \(1\le t\le2\): \(t\approx1.428\).
(c) Position is \(<(4-2\sin(t^2))\cos(t^2),(4-2\sin(t^2))\sin(t^2)>\); at \(t=1.5\), velocity is approximately \(<-8.072,-1.673>\).
